mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is flat or rising from an already-low level while CPIAUCSL stays elevated, markets price less policy accommodation and a higher real-rate path, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If CPIAUCSL remains above its prior 6-month trend and FEDFUNDS is unchanged or higher, but the 10-year yield falls on average over the next 20 trading days in more than 60% of triggered instances, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE after a period of labor tightening signals weakening growth and lower future inflation, which pushes the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days as investors price a safer macro path.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp over 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE crosses the 0.2pp 2-month rise threshold but the 10-year yield rises over the next 20 trading days in most such cases, or if the conditional average change is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous acceleration in RSAFS and PAYEMS indicates broad nominal demand strength, forcing markets to price firmer growth and inflation; that lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next month.
failure_condition: If joint positive monthly changes in RSAFS and PAYEMS do not correspond to a higher 10-year yield over the next 20 trading days, or if the effect vanishes when either series is weak, reject the interaction.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO signals softer industrial activity and reduced goods-price pressure, which lowers expected growth and inflation compensation and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if negative monthly changes in INDPRO are followed by a higher 10-year yield over 20 trading days more often than not, or if the conditional mean yield change is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST falls sharply below its recent trend, housing weakness signals slower medium-term demand and lower inflation pressure, so the 10-year Treasury yield declines over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines more than 5% from its 3-month average
failure_condition: If HOUST drops more than 5% below its 3-month average but the 10-year yield rises over the next 60 trading days in a majority of cases, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: An explicit tightening signal occurs when FEDFUNDS rises while CPIAUCSL stays sticky; markets then reprice the policy path upward and the 10-year Treasury yield rises over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS increases by at least 25 bps within 2 months while CPIAUCSL is flat or higher
failure_condition: Reject if the specified tightening condition occurs and the 10-year yield does not rise over the following 5 trading days, or if the average 5-day change is negative.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle labor squeeze, falling PAYEMS together with UNRATE holding below its recent range signals weakening payroll momentum before unemployment turns up, which should pull the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint payroll deceleration and low unemployment fail to predict a lower 10-year yield over 20 trading days, or if the effect is present when only one labor series weakens.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in GDPC1 after weak prior readings signals firmer real activity and higher term-premium expectations, which lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 accelerates above its prior 2-quarter growth rate
failure_condition: Reject if above-trend GDPC1 growth does not correspond to a higher 10-year yield over the next 60 trading days, or if the conditional average yield change is not positive.
